A '''crowbar''' was a short, primitive metallic tool used around [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] to pry open wooden containers. [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] used such a tool with its single curved flat pointed end to gain access to a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop bike]] stored in one of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea's]] [[Outsider Citadel/Legends|Outsider Citadels]]. It could, however, also be used as a clubbing weapon.

In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] used this tool to pry hull plates away to get access inside almost finished [[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]].
